ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Didaci Bua, Palermo, Vol.I, p. 50 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.). Another publication, not in BL collections, is: Il trionfo della Giustitia... discorso accademico recitato in casa dell`Ill.mo monsignor Ciampini (1691)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
